reviews.review_description: Terrible game I would rare it a negative 100 if I could
Do not buy there is no game it’s just you shooting on the
Any five star review you see is a bot. The game doesn’t work. You can spend $5 to see what I mean if you want.
Its fun but y’all really need to add multiplayer and maneuverability ￼

Hands and stick movement is pretty nice and fluid but graphics on goalies are bad there a better game with similar name on oculus go which is sad to say...but if they beefed up graphics and made it to where you could move and not just be a stationary shooter this would be incredible game please due hockey fans would pay top dollar

I am an eleven year old peewee and I got this game hoping it could help me practice but there was really be major problem that needed to be fixed, PLEASE ADD A STICK ADJUSTABILITY SETTING. The only problem I had was that the stick was too long. It seemed like it was meant for adults but to use it up you have to be the right height. I found this very disappointing and I guarantee more people would play this if the stick was the right height.

The game is probably the best vr hockey game and is great for training when you can’t go to the rink with the real stick, I would give this game a 5 stars but there is not much to do, firstly I would add multiplayer and then start working in single player modes
Pretty good if your playing with a stick
I would of gave it a four but it only has 3 game modes so if they like added more modes it would be better

I am new to ice hockey and play in a beer leagueand this app has helped me with getting lots of repititions of shots and timing for one timers on differents parts of the ice while at home which has increased my ability on the ice with feeling more comfortable when needing to get a shot off or hit a one timer.
I got the real stick attatchment and that makes it a WHOLE lot better, I would highly recomend getting the attatchment for more realism

reviews.review_title: VR ice hockeys are not a crowded space
reviews.review_description: Realism was good, shooting was properly hard as it should be. Also the dark and cold atmosphere of the forest was great. In real life you know where is the ground, and you can mainly look at the goalie in time of shooting, just to try to throw the puck to the correct place. Harder in this game than in real life.

Playing this game with the real stick has completely changed my real life hockey game. Because of how quick and easy it is I am able to shoot one to two hundred pucks a night. Seeing the puck go in so many times was so important for my mental game as it made it feel so much easier to score. It also had me lifting my head more to look for the shot first. I went from maybe scoring in a game to scoring at least one goal every game. Got my first hatty too! My only issue with the game is that the puck feels a little light. But I can easily get past this for all the benefits.
It was amazing for me training/practicing for my next game!
This is awesome.Now I can shoot top shelf.

First, thank you developers for this VR hockey,  I enjoyed it very much.
Please continue to add more gameplay,  more different game mode if possible, 
A unlimited shot, unlimited time mode, or allow to set play time ,  passing shot,  able to point to locations and play if possible.   More gameplay please.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are gathering feedback and feature requests from comments and reviews and we are going to be working on free updates to bring more fun to the game. Your feedback has been noted as part of that process. Thank you for taking the time to reach out!

reviews.review_description: Had a blast playing this the other night and look forward to future builds.  I was not using the attachment but I do see how it would advance the experience.  It was a little odd getting one-timers from the opposite wing (behind me) but overall, great fun. Well done!
I would give it negative 5 stars if I could.On the bright side it’s only like $4

reviews.review_title: A must have for Hockey fans
reviews.review_description:
Take shots on Goal with realistic feeling control, this is the Hockey VR game you have been looking for on Oculus Quest 2 and its only $4. 

Video: https://youtu.be/B8GJblu6aJI

Graphically it looks fantastic with great goalie animations, and 3 distinct looking environments. Taking shots on an open net or targets is great practice but facing off against the goalie is where I truly fell in love with the game.

It has great assist modes that make it feel realistic without making it too difficult though it does disable the leaderboard so you still have motivation to not always play on the easier mode. 

I didn't use the optional real stick accessory but holding the stick using two oculus touch controllers felt natural and exactly like I felt it should feel. 

Check out my video review for more info and some slick 4k gameplay, but this is definitely a fantastic Hockey VR game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for writing this and going so in depth with your video!

reviews.review_title: Not too much content, but good content
reviews.review_description: The game is very well made and polished, despite the fact that there’s not too much content in it. The quality of the game definitely makes up for it.
